item.lastwitness.echo_of_past.help: A memory separated from its former vessel.
tooltip.lastwitness.echo_of_past.help_1: A faint memory clings to this item.
tooltip.lastwitness.echo_of_past.help_2: Its memory may be separated by intense heat.
lastwitness.configuration.title: Last Witness Configs
jei.lastwitness.echo_of_past.chance: A newly spawned living entity has a %s chance to carry an echo.
jei.lastwitness.echo_of_past.drop: When an echo-bearing entity dies, one random item from its generated drops stores that memory.
jei.lastwitness.echo_of_past.extract: Throw that marked drop into intense heat, such as lava, to extract the memory and obtain this item.
